rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Banned words — grep zero-tolerance
Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban
No stale markers, no 'fixed' retrospectives, no session biography
Register match
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 71: 'A chat ends. A system doesn't. That's not a feature; that's the whole difference.' — peer-warm, counterintuitive

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Don't smuggle terms of art from maintainer into body
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 47: guardrail earned inline; line 39: memory earned; line 88: skill reference downstream

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Over-hedge detector
Punchy framing keeps its punch; carve-out lives downstream
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 71: sharp framing holds; no softening needed

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Value-prop / positioning framing belongs in sales copy + strategy, NOT in student-facing body
Watch out for planting jargon too early

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Aspirational destination, never corrective gap
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 32: walk in with frame, not shame

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Earn every technical term on first use
rules_evaluated.evidence: connectors l.15 earned; skill l.88 earned downstream; autonomy l.99 context carries

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Memory vs context — use deliberately

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Always 'you', never 'the student'; teacher framing stays out of body

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No em-dashes. Simple sentences
LLM-vs-agent-vs-Claude vocabulary discipline

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Reflection beats stay invisible in the flow
